FROM ubuntu:jammy

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install required packages
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    lsb-release \
    python3-pip \
    build-essential \
    libssl-dev \
    libffi-dev \
    python3-dev \
    curl \
    gnupg2 \
    ca-certificates

# Install ROS 2 Humble and rosbag2 (includes rosbag2_py)
RUN apt update && \
    apt install -y curl gnupg2 lsb-release && \
    curl -sSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ros/rosdistro/master/ros.asc | tee /etc/apt/trusted.gpg.d/ros.asc && \
    echo "deb [arch=amd64] http://packages.ros.org/ros2/ubuntu $(lsb_release -cs) main" | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/ros2-latest.list && \
    apt update && \
    apt install -y \
    ros-humble-desktop \
    ros-humble-rosbag2 && \
    apt-get clean && \
    echo "source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash" >> ~/.bashrc

# Install ROS 2 dependencies (colcon, etc.)
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y \
    python3-colcon-common-extensions \
    ros-humble-ros-base \
    ros-humble-ros2cli && \
    apt-get clean

# Set ROS 2 environment variables (needed for rosbag2_py)
ENV ROS_DISTRO=humble
ENV AMENT_PREFIX_PATH=/opt/ros/humble
ENV COLCON_PREFIX_PATH=/opt/ros/humble
ENV PYTHONPATH=/opt/ros/humble/lib/python3.10/site-packages:${PYTHONPATH}
ENV PATH=/opt/ros/humble/bin:${PATH}
ENV LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/opt/ros/humble/lib:${LD_LIBRARY_PATH}
ENV PKG_CONFIG_PATH=/opt/ros/humble/lib/pkgconfig:${PKG_CONFIG_PATH}
ENV ROS_PYTHON_VERSION=3
ENV ROS_VERSION=2

# Set environment variables for pip
ENV PIP_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT=100

# Install Python dependencies
# poetry export -f requirements.txt --without-hashes --with dev,local --output requirements-local.txt
COPY ./requirements-local.txt /tmp/requirements.txt
RUN pip3 install -r /tmp/requirements.txt

# Install NGINX
RUN apt-get update && \
    echo "deb http://nginx.org/packages/mainline/ubuntu $(lsb_release -cs) nginx" \
    >> /etc/apt/sources.list.d/nginx.list && \
    echo "deb-src http://nginx.org/packages/mainline/ubuntu $(lsb_release -cs) nginx" \
    >> /etc/apt/sources.list.d/nginx.list && \
    curl -fsSL https://nginx.org/keys/nginx_signing.key | apt-key add - && \
    apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    nginx && \
    apt-get clean

# Copy application code
COPY . /srv/navlue
RUN mkdir /srv/navlue/app/static
WORKDIR /srv/navlue/app

# Configure nginx
RUN rm /etc/nginx/nginx.conf && \
    cp /srv/navlue/.config/local/nginx.conf /etc/nginx && \
    mkdir /var/log/gunicorn

# Copy startup script
COPY startup_local.sh /usr/local/bin/startup.sh
RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/startup.sh
ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/startup.sh"]","start_line":1}]}},{"event_id":"14136c68-9354-49fc-a1d1-0d8a877fca38-result-toolu_019bCstoCvF9FQNJ85j9gRML","timestamp":"2026-01-12T12:22:32.052Z","event_type":{"type":"ToolResult","data":{"name":"Bash","is_error":false}},"content":{"blocks":[{"type":"Text","text":"-rw-r--r--@ 1 hwisookim  staff  1791 Jan 12 19:31 ~/seadronix/navlue_backend/local.env"}]}},{"event_id":"94477527-233b-45af-ae26-72623ee37b20-thinking","timestamp":"2026-01-12T12:22:35.113Z","event_type":{"type":"Thinking"},"content":{"blocks":[{"type":"Text","text":"local.env 파일이 있습니다. 이제 requirements-local.txt 파일이 있는지 확인하고, 도커 빌드를 시작하겠습니다. RUN apt update && \

    curl -sSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ros/rosdistro/master/ros.asc | tee /etc/apt/trusted.gpg.d/ros.asc && \
    echo "deb [arch=amd64] http://packages.ros.org/ros2/ubuntu $(lsb_release -cs) main" | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/ros2-latest.list && \

    apt install -y \
